## Who died

<!-- Name of the business / event / organization. -->

## When

- Born: <!-- year founded -->
- Died: <!-- year it ceased operating -->

## Category

<!-- One of: Gaming, Tech, Retail, Finance, Sports -->

## Cause of death

<!-- 2–5 words. The headline reason. -->

## Why it belongs in the cemetery

<!-- One or two sentences. What makes this story worth a tombstone? -->

## Sources

<!-- Links that verify the `died` year and cause. News article, Wikipedia, SEC filing, obituary, etc. At least one. -->

-
-

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry added to `graves.json`, grouped with its category
- [ ] `graves.json` still parses (`python3 -m json.tool graves.json > /dev/null`)
- [ ] No duplicate `name` already in the file
- [ ] `died >= born`
- [ ] Epitaph is 1–3 sentences, matches the voice in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] Category is one of the five allowed values
